phrases.text_local: Pode recomendar um bom café aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG BOHNG kuh-FEH uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao balconista sobre o café.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-koo-NEESH-tuh SOHB-rih AW kuh-FEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter staff about the coffee.

responses.english: Ask the counter staff about the coffee.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-koo-NEESH-tuh SOHB-rih AW kuh-FEH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao balconista sobre o café.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir o recibo na caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER AW reh-SEE-boo NUH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I get the receipt? You can ask for the receipt at the cashier.

responses.english: Where can I get the receipt? You can ask for the receipt at the cashier.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER AW reh-SEE-boo NUH KEYE-shuh.
responses.local: Pode pedir o recibo na caixa.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um bom café aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG BOHNG kuh-FEH uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pode pedir uma bica ou um galão no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER OO-muh BEE-kuh OHW OONNG guh-LOWN NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: You can order an espresso or a galão at the counter.

responses.english: You can order an espresso or a galão at the counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER OO-muh BEE-kuh OHW OONNG guh-LOWN NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: Pode pedir uma bica ou um galão no balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the register is for receipts
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde é o balcão para o recibo?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih EH AW bahl-KOWN PUH-ruh AW reh-SEE-boo?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese cafés, the register is usually at the main counter. Pointing and asking directly is efficient.

likely_response.local: No balcão principal, ao lado da vitrine.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL, OW LAH-doo DUH veet-REE-nih.
likely_response.translation_en: At the main counter, next to the display case.

responses.english: At the main counter, next to the display case.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL, OW LAH-doo DUH veet-REE-nih.
responses.local: No balcão principal, ao lado da vitrine.
